explanations.8: This function uses jsonschema.validate to check if the data matches the schema structure; it raises an exception if something doesn't match instead of returning true/false.
explanations.16: This catches a specific type of error (ValidationError) that jsonschema throws when validation fails, so we can handle it differently than other unexpected errors.
explanations.17: This line has a syntax error — the f-string is missing the opening quote after f, it should be f"Data is invalid: {exception}" instead.
